_comment: Single config for auto mode. One entry per forge phase. Chain order (spec -> plan -> impl -> review) is fixed in code; this file only tunes the knobs. Read at runtime from the mounted repo, so edits take effect on the next `lanes` run — no image rebuild. model: opus|sonnet|haiku. skill/skills: the superpowers skill(s) the phase uses (null/absent = built-in self-review for review). maxTurns/maxThinkingTokens: null = no limit; positive integer = cap. maxTurns below are runaway guards sized ~3-4x a normal run (a moderate run used ~36/30/58/28 turns for spec/plan/impl/review) — high enough to never trip healthy work, finite enough to stop a loop. Hitting the cap ends the phase non-success -> recorded `blocked`, chain stops (like any failure). Bump them for very large repos. maxThinkingTokens left null (model default).
